ddls:
CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method used for the analysis */,
  "iter_scale" INTEGER /* Number of iterations scaled for the analysis */,
  "repeat" INTEGER /* Number of repeats for the analysis */,
  "tree_name" TEXT /* Name of the tree generated by the analysis */,
  "data_file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data file used in the analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete the analysis in seconds */,
  "analysis_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current version of the analysis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., initial, updated, revised) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_data_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("data_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "method_parameters" TEXT /* Default parameters for the method */,
  "method_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current version of the method */,
  "method_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis to which the metric belongs */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current version of the metric */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "data_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., FASTA, MSF) */,
  "data_file_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current version of the data file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "file_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "role_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "data_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file accessed */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("data_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the analysis */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "version_duration" REAL /* Duration of the version in seconds */,
  "version_ip" TEXT /* IP address where the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_versions_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_file_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data file */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "version_duration" REAL /* Duration of the version in seconds */,
  "version_ip" TEXT /* IP address where the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_file_versions_data_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("data_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis to which the parameter belongs */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "param_status" TEXT /* Status of the parameter (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "param_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_parameters_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)
